channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped fridge and chair, 14th June
item.description:
There is a fridge under a chair dumped on the right hand side of the road driving up Gotherington Lane towards Gotherington.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abbotswood Mini roundabout is in very poor condition, 14th June
item.description:
Abbotswood Mini roundabout is in very poor condition It is probable that none of the immediate issues here meet the pothole intervention specifications, however, overall this section of road is out of repair. Consequently the county council needs to programme this for repair. Please advise what priority has been given to this in GCC maintenance programme and when it is planned for repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of detritus in middle is road on Ermin street near Abottswood roundabout, 14th June
item.description:
Large area of detritus in middle is road on Ermin street near Abottswood roundabout There is also piles of detritus on footway edge adjacent with weeds growing in detritus that should also be cleared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose sewer cover rattling every time vehicle goes over it on A46 near Toby Carvery entrance, 14th June
item.description:
Loose sewer cover rattling every time vehicle goes over it on A46 near Toby Carvery entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.title: High level of detritus and weeds growing in detritus in middle of A46 near to Toby Carvery, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Entrance to Toby Carvery (within Highway boundary) there are series of potholes more prominent on entrance lane, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds up to 12ft high, 5ft nettles, brambes, path basically blocked, 14th June
item.description:
Pretty much the length of the path but at it's worst from bridge over stream to airport end.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herrick Close, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Giveway junction at Oldbury Orchard/Paynes Pitch, 14th June
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Oldbury Orchard, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Edging stones from recent works raised and moving, 14th June
item.description:
Edging stones from recent works raised and moving (at all 3 locations). Needs final resurfacing works to make secure and usable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramble Chase, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury

item.title: Barriers from recent works in dangerous positions, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury

item.title: Temporary road sign face down in verge, 14th June
item.description:
Temporary road sign face down in verge - this is a trip hazard and would cause damage to verge cutting machincery.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Drain is blocked and rain spills out onto the road, 14th June
item.description:
Between 56 Quat Goose Lane and Home Farm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Quat Goose Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole or drain cover, 14th June
item.description:
This cover makes a loud cluncking noise everytime a car drives over it, being on the A435 bypass that is a lot of noise. Living close by means not being able to sleep.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th June
item.description:
Even more rubbish dumped in the usual location. Why does the council allow this to happen?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cement ramp added, 13th June
item.description:
A cement ramp has been added at the back of a shop causing a bump and an obstruction to those possibly in wheel chairs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3A, 3B, New Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Previously reported damage to road not repaired, 13th June
item.description:
